message:
fix(tests): Correct quoting assertion and mock isolation

- transfer: Update env quoting test to expect '\'' style instead of "'"
  (shell_escape crate now uses backslash-escaped single quotes)
- hook: Disable mock mode in fail-open tests to test actual behavior
  (tests were incorrectly passing through mock infrastructure)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
